title: Within Earshot
description:
Proximity voice for Foundry: remote volume follows token distance and walls. Optional GM global voice and voice-token shortcut. Any system.

Voice token shortcut (default Ctrl+Shift+V): select a token you control, then press the shortcut to pin your voice to that token; press again on the same token to clear and fall back to automatic (assigned character) position. Rebind under Configure Controls → Within Earshot. GM: assign a key there for “Toggle GM voice” (global vs token proximity) if you want it on the keyboard.

Install: Setup → Add-on Modules → Install Module → https://raw.githubusercontent.com/X4mb/within-earshot-fvtt/main/module.json
